tools.Name: LiteLLM
tools.Description: A unified AI gateway and Python SDK for calling over 100 LLM providers in a standard OpenAI format.
tools.Use_Case: Unified interface for swapping LLM providers without rewriting code, adding cost tracking, and managing load balancing.

tools.Name: Open Interpreter
tools.Description: A natural language interface that allows LLMs to execute code (Python, JavaScript, Shell) locally on your computer.
tools.Use_Case: Controlling the computer's general-purpose capabilities through natural language for file manipulation, browser research, and data analysis.

tools.Name: Transformers
tools.Description: A foundational model-definition framework providing state-of-the-art pretrained models for text, vision, audio, and multimodal tasks.
tools.Use_Case: Serving as the central pivot for model definitions used by various inference engines and training frameworks across the AI ecosystem.
